publicMainRepository.description: Modular open-source File Viewer ecosystem for 200+ formats: TypeScript core, on-demand renderers, presets, Vue/React/Web/Svelte components, demos, docs, and releases.

branches.name: main
branches.description: Maintains the complete private original aggregate workspace, release automation, apps, docs, packages, compatibility aliases, ecosystem export scripts, and internal integration history. It is not the public open-source aggregate repository and is not reduced to @file-viewer/core.

branches.name: v2
branches.description: Tracks the Vue 2.7 integration experience while sharing the same @file-viewer/core foundation and public component repository.

branches.name: v3
branches.description: Tracks the Vue 3 component package and v3 demo experience while sharing the same @file-viewer/core foundation and public component repository.
